arts.ttl: Renée lauds support in UWCL win
arts.sum: We managed it really well, so I think again a very professional win from the team.” The girls are doing what they need to do already now, minutes after the game, to get ready for Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Alessio Russo at the double as Arsenal see off Valerenga in Champions League
arts.sum: The result keeps the Gunners one point behind Group C leaders Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: How to watch Valerenga vs Arsenal Women
arts.sum: We’re back in UEFA Women’s Champions League action on Thursday as we face Valerenga away. MATCHWEEK 5 UEFA WOMENS CHAMPIONS LEAGUE FIXTURES

After securing a decisive victory over Valerenga at the Emirates Stadium back in October, and off the back of a 4-0 victory against Aston Villa, we now travel to Vålerenga Stadion where the Norwegian side will host us in their capital city. Drawing to Bayern Munich Women in the last UEFA Champions League group game on home turf, Valerenga look to add to their point on the board when we come to visit.
